title: Microsoft Teams App Release!

posts.author: Becca-monday.com (Rebecca Katz (monday.com))
posts.cookedHtml:
We are excited to announce the release of our Microsoft Teams app! You can now embed monday.com Work OS directly in your Teams channel!

You learn more about the new app in our blog post and our support article:

monday.com Blog – 16 Nov 20

monday.com + Microsoft Teams: New meeting extensibility feature

You can now integrate monday.com with MS Teams, and enjoy all of the benefits of a Work OS to run and track your projects, processes, and workflows.

Est. reading time: 2 minutes

Support

Microsoft Teams App

Seamlessly connect your monday.com projects with Microsoft teams with our monday.com app! With this amazing functionality, you will be able to connect your monday.com boards to selected Microsoft t...

Try it out and let us know what you think! We would love if you would provide us your feedback here:

forms.monday.com

monday.com app feedback | monday.com forms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.

posts.author: OmerZ (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Becca-monday.com & team,

I’ve been waiting for this for such a long time, it’s a great and promising start!

In my opinion, the only way to make this integration useful and productive is to add two features:

  1. The “notify user” option, the same as you have with Slack.

  2. Add the @mention when sending it to a channel.

Super useful for reminders and alerts. Once you have at least one of the above items, you will witness a major increase in usability.

Thank you and keep up the excellent work.

image3140×1303 234 KB

posts.author: OmerZ (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Becca-monday.com / Monday Team,

Any updates or plans to implement it soon?

Thanks.

posts.author: robgibbs (Rob Gibbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi…did anyone else notice this is now broken? Guessing MS working so fast to keep up with pandemic feature requests that something changed in the API.

The notifications that are supposed to come through with the Bot just…don’t.

posts.author: lizpfahler (Elizabeth Pfahler)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t even find the monday app on Teams

posts.author: OmerZ (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lizpfahler. This might help.

image353×716 25.2 KB

posts.author: lizpfahler (Elizabeth Pfahler)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much for the response! it turns out that our admin was blocking some 3rd party apps in Teams but we resolved that and it’s working great now!
